title: During Suite 5.2.43 test e closure
summary: Durante il micro-blocco sono stati eseguiti test statici, test plugin locale, closure operativa e verifica zip. Nessun deploy e nessuna modifica WordPress live.
tests: node scripts/test_template_builder_gutenberg_native.js OK 11/11; node scripts/test_template_builder_inline_editor.js OK 31/31; SHSS_EXPECTED_VERSION=5.2.43 node scripts/test_skinharmony_site_suite_plugin.js OK; npm run suite:operational:closure OK preflight 22/22 local 1583/1583; unzip -t dist/skinharmony-site-suite-5.2.43.zip OK
